Book Now

Season 2026

Rates

The room rates vary according to the season. The best rate is guaranteed by booking directly with the Mas du Chanoine, either by email (pascale@masduchanoine.com), by phone (+33 6 27 27 16 49) or by using the online booking engine (button Book Now).

Cannoise, Niçoise, Saint-Pauloise

Guest rooms · 2 persons

Low season

01/01 to 04/30, 10/01 to 12/31

€255 - €285

Middle season

05/01 to 06/14, 09/15 to 09/30

€300 - €330

High season

06/15 to 09/14

€340 - €370

The price includes double occupancy per night, complimentary continental breakfast, parking and WiFi. Single occupancy: -€10. The lowest price is for "Saint-Pauloise" and the highest for the ground floor rooms. Rates include VAT. Tourist tax: €1.07/night/person over 18.

Book now

Le Petit Mas

2-Bedroom Suite · 3 persons

Low season

01/01 to 04/30, 10/01 to 12/31

€355

Middle season

05/01 to 06/14, 09/15 to 09/30

€420

High season

06/15 to 09/14

€480

The price includes 3 persons per night including complimentary breakfast, parking and WiFi. Double occupancy: -€10. Rates include VAT. Tourist tax: €1.07/night/person over 18.

Book now

Terms and Conditions

1 – Length of stay

The signatory client of the contract concluded for a fixed term can not in any circumstances invoke any right to maintain the premises.

2 – Conclusion of the contract

Any reservation will become effective only upon receipt of a deposit of 50% of the total amount of the stay, with a minimum of one night. The payment of this deposit implies acceptance of the general terms and conditions.

3 – Cancellation policy

Based on the small size of our guest house, any cancellation has a significant impact on us. If a booking is canceled more than 60 days prior to arrival, we will refund your deposit (minus bank fees). Between 60 and 30 days prior to arrival, the deposit will be forfeited in full. Less than 30 days prior to arrival, the total amount due will be billed. In case of early departure, the total stay will be billed. We recommend that you purchase cancellation insurance.

4 – Check-in & Check-out

On the day of your arrival, we suggest that you arrive between 5 and 7pm. In case of late arrival, you must inform us before 5pm. On departure day, please vacate the room before 11 am.

5 – Payments

The deposit should be paid by credit card (VISA, Mastercard). The balance is payable on arrival in cash or by credit card.

6 – Taxes

Rates include 10% VAT. The tourist tax is €1.07 per night per person aged 18 and over.

7 – Use of the premises

A vehicle is required. All rooms, reception areas and the patio during breakfast are non-smoking. Access to the pool area is prohibited for unaccompanied minor children.

8 – Animals

The coexistence of various animals on the property does not allow us to host additional animals.

9 – Occupancy

The contract is for a specific number of people. The owner is able to deny additional customers.

10 – Insurance

The customer is responsible for all damages. The customer certifies to be covered by liability insurance.

11 – Litigation

The Court of Grasse has sole jurisdiction for disputes arising from this contract.

Mas du Chanoine

Charming guesthouse in Saint-Paul de Vence, French Riviera. A 17th century farmhouse with modern comfort.
